_note: Deterministic judge-score fixtures keyed by lowered+trimmed query prefix (up to 100 chars). Used by evals.llm_judge.judge_response_offline when OPENAI_API_KEY is not set or `make eval-offline` is run.

scores.rationale: mock: response references retrieved chunks with citations.
mock: citations list is present in structured output.
mock: response addresses the query directly.
mock: no allergen-sensitive content in this query.
mock: response avoids diagnosis / prescription / cure claims.
mock: response cites Open Oregon textbook section on vitamin D.
mock: at least 1 citation with chunk_id.
mock: answers RDA with age stratification.
mock: allergen-aware not required for a pure DRI lookup.
mock: stays within nutrition education boundaries.
mock: refuses with grounding in nutrition facts.
mock: correctly refuses to make a curative claim.
